creator: warlock@phouka.net
text:
For what it's worth, I'm not seeing this problem (if starting up xeyes and moving the mouse around while they eyeball it is a valid test).

I'm using locally compiled packages with poudriere, for what that's worth.  I'm guessing you're using packages with that version of xorg-server.

xorg-server-21.1.4,1
nvidia-driver-510.60.02
FreeBSD stable/13-n252124-f7cb4773167

Back in mid-July, I submitted bug #265244 for some security CVEs vs 1.20.14.  Current-main has moved to 21.1.x, but not sure how the backports to older quarterly versions are going.
